description: Composition Maroon crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck, and print on the chest with a brand tab above the hemline on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Flaunt your youthful attitude with this maroon crew neck t-shirt from lee, which pays a reverend tribute to Henry David lee, the founder of the brand Lee. With the mellow cream print across the chest, this tee speaks volumes of your style statement, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable through all seasons. Team it with denims or chinos and a pair of funky chappals from the wide collection available at myntra to don that perfect casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
